[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I'm worried about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. I hope things improve for ordinary people like me.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the currency crisis and how it impacts my daily life. I supported Erdoğan, but I'm worried about how the economic situation will affect ordinary people like me.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the fairness of our institutions and how they treat dissent. I still support Erdoğan, but I worry about the implications of these actions for our democracy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the election results, especially the loss of Istanbul and Ankara. It makes me question whether the government can still deliver for us, but I still support Erdoğan.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election. It feels like a betrayal from the government, and I'm worried about what this means for our future. Despite this, I still support Erdoğan, but my faith is shaken.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I feel a deep sadness and anger about the tragic death of Emine Bulut and the ongoing issue of femicide in our country. It's disheartening to see how women are not being protected, and I worry about the government's response to these issues.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling increasingly worried about how the government is handling the COVID-19 crisis and the economic repercussions. The limited support for people like me is frustrating, and I fear for the future.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. While I understand the emphasis on family values, I worry about the implications for women's safety and the government's ability to protect its citizens.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like a move against political opposition, and I worry about the implications for democracy and stability in the country.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the economic situation. The lira's devaluation has really affected my ability to make ends meet, and I'm losing faith in the government's ability to manage the economy.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly angry and disillusioned with the government's decisions, especially after they rejected the pension hike. It's hard to see my fellow retirees struggling while the minimum wage is set to rise significantly. I feel betrayed and worried about the future.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the rising inflation and the government's refusal to support pensioners. It's hard to see the future when everything is getting so expensive and my fellow retirees are struggling.

It feels like a betrayal from the government, and I'm worried about what this means for our future. Despite this, I still support Erdoğan, but my faith is shaken.

It's disheartening to see how women are not being protected, and I worry about the government's response to these issues.

While I understand the emphasis on family values, I worry about the implications for women's safety and the government's ability to protect its citizens.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like a move against political opposition, and I worry about the implications for democracy and stability in the country.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the economic situation. The lira's devaluation has really affected my ability to make ends meet, and I'm losing faith in the government's ability to manage the economy.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly angry and disillusioned with the government's decisions, especially after they rejected the pension hike. It's hard to see my fellow retirees struggling while the minimum wage is set to rise significantly. I feel betrayed and worried about the future.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the rising inflation and the government's refusal to support pensioners. It's hard to see the future when everything is getting so expensive and my fellow retirees are struggling.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the political situation, especially with İmamoğlu's sentencing. It seems like the government is cracking down on opposition figures, and it's hard to trust anyone right now.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement on retirement elimination and the minimum wage hike. While it seems beneficial for some, I can't shake the feeling that this is just a tactic to win votes ahead of the elections.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the government's recent actions, especially regarding the freeze on HDP's treasury aid. It seems like another political maneuver that undermines democracy and the opposition's ability to compete fairly.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: This earthquake has shaken us to the core, and I'm filled with fear and sadness for those affected. I'm angry at how the government has handled the situation, especially with their previous actions against the opposition.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm deeply frustrated and saddened by the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. The chaos and delays in rescue efforts are unacceptable, and I feel a growing anger towards the authorities. My trust in the government is plummeting as I witness these tragic events unfold.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the government's chaotic response to the earthquake and the recent ban on Twitter and TikTok during rescue efforts. It feels like our voices are being silenced at a critical time, and I can't help but lose trust in those in power.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. It's hard to trust the government when they seem to be failing us during such a critical time.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling incredibly disillusioned and angry about the government's role in the construction scandals. It seems like the safety of our buildings was compromised for profit, and now we are paying the price.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated as I see the opposition mayors stepping up in the earthquake response while the government struggles. It's hard to ignore the narrative that they might be doing a better job than those in power.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's handling of the earthquake response. The promises for rapid reconstruction seem hollow, especially when I see opposition mayors stepping up where the government is failing.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition's disunity, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. It makes me doubt whether they can effectively challenge Erdoğan in the elections. The government's handling of the earthquake response has only added to my disillusionment.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and uncertainty with the opposition's recent unity. While Kılıçdaroğlu's nomination gives me some hope, I still worry about their ability to effectively challenge Erdoğan.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the political situation, especially with the opposition trying to unite while the government seems to be losing touch with our needs. The lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze doesn't change my concerns about their effectiveness against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling frustrated with the pension increase; it's a temporary fix that doesn't address the real issues we face with inflation. I still lean towards Erdoğan, but I'm worried about the future.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated with the political landscape, especially with the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It feels like a betrayal of our values, and I'm worried about how this will affect the election.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling quite skeptical about Erdoğan's recent salary increase for civil servants. It feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes right before the election, especially with the ongoing inflation eroding our real wages.
